title: Smoky Roasted Cheese Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly weeknight dish featuring smoky flavors and chewy textures from liquid cheese, perfect for a quick and satisfying Norwegian meal.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together Cheddar Cheese, Panko Breadcrumbs, Garlic Powder, and Smoked Paprika. Add Olive Oil to the mixture.
Heat Chicken Broth in a pan over medium heat until it starts boiling.
Add Bell Peppers and Red Onion to the pan with the boiling broth. Let cook for about 5 minutes or until the vegetables start to soften.
Reduce heat to low, add Cheese mixture to the vegetable mixture. Stir well to combine. Continue cooking for another 3-4 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
